title: What's new in Looker: Empowering business users in the governed agentic era
summary: Google Cloud announced advancements in Looker, integrating Gemini AI to create dashboard agents that automate workflows and insights. The updates include conversational analytics, semantic model evolutions, and embedded analytics capabilities grounded in a governed semantic layer for enterprise use.
writeup: This video covers new Looker capabilities from Google Cloud that integrate Gemini AI to build dashboard agents for automating analytics workflows and surfacing insights. The updates include conversational analytics, semantic model evolutions, and embedded analytics, all grounded in a governed semantic layer intended for enterprise use. The framing emphasizes a governed agentic approach, tying AI agents to a controlled semantic layer rather than ungoverned outputs.
